creator: rmrf17@gmail.com
text:
Hi.

I've also got this bug.
Correction for this in port audio/openal configure script line 22544:

<                NASM_FORMAT="-f elf"
>                NASM_FORMAT="-f elf32"

nasm -hf suggests that -f elf and -f elf32 the same, but this is diffrerence
in undefined vs defined symbols.

--
Vitaly Belekhov
